meta.title: AI Dev 25 | Matt Palmer: Idea to app—shipping fast with Replit
meta.description:
Got an idea but not sure how to bring it to life? In this hands-on session, Matt Palmer, Head of Developer Relations at Replit, walked AI Dev 25 attendees through how to take an app from concept to live deployment—all in one workshop.

Whether you’re just getting started or looking to speed up your workflow, you’ll learn practical tips for turning ideas into working web apps using Replit’s powerful cloud-based dev environment.

This session is all about momentum: building fast, iterating quickly, and shipping with confidence.
